case_title: KALPESHKUMAR GOHIL VS. KELLY MARIE CAPERTON ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOHIL, KALPESHKUMAR DBA ADMIRAL HOTEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAPERTON, KELLY MARIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 608 O'FARRELL ST., UNIT 51, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT CAPERTON, KELLY MARIE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOHIL, KALPESHKUMAR DBA ADMIRAL HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT CAPERTON, KELLY MARIE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOHIL, KALPESHKUMAR DBA ADMIRAL HOTEL
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOHIL, KALPESHKUMAR DBA ADMIRAL HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT CAPERTON, KELLY MARIE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CAPERTON, KELLY MARIE
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CAPERTON, KELLY MARIE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOHIL, KALPESHKUMAR DBA ADMIRAL HOTEL SERVED AUG-20-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CAPERTON, KELLY MARIE
